title: How a messianic movement is changing the Israeli military
subhead: Followers of the Hardal movement, a blend of religious fundamentalism and ultranationalism, have begun to make inroads into the military establishment. Their dehumanizing rhetoric toward Palestinians has contributed to the destruction of the Gaza Strip.

France summons US ambassador over comments on slain far-right activist
'Ultra-left,' 'antifa': What do these labels really mean?
subhead: A variety of terms have been used in France's public debate to describe far-left groups after the fatal beating of far-right activist Quentin Deranque. Le Monde takes a look at the history behind each, in the French context.

title: Karyna Shuliak was Jeffrey Epstein's last partner and main heiress. She won't benefit from his will
subhead: The Belarusian woman met the sexual predator when she was 20 and remained loyal to him until his suicide in prison in 2019.

title: 2026 Winter Olympics: The most striking photos from the Games
subhead: The 2026 edition of the Winter Olympic Games in Milan-Cortina, Italy, was filled with outstanding performances.

title: Oleksandr Syrsky, commander of the Ukrainian arm, to Le Monde: 'Russian army losses have exceeded its recruitment level'
subhead: The Ukrainian commander-in-chief told Le Monde that, despite a 'very difficult' situation on the battlefield, his army continued to resist 'the most powerful army in Europe' and to 'foil' Russian military plans.

subhead: Amid negotiations over Iran's nuclear program, Donald Trump amasses US military assets at bases and in the surrounding seas. Using satellite imagery and other open sources, Le Monde documented an unprecedented deployment.
byline: Brice Donadille,  Fabien Leboucq and  Liselotte Mas

subhead: Arthur Mensch stands out for his views on the risks posed by artificial intelligence, which have been voiced by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei.
